rumor.detail: Appointed head coach of Tanzanian giants Young Africans, replacing Pedro Gonçalves

newIntel.reasoning: Major development: Mngqithi departed Golden Arrows and secured new role at Yanga. Published Jul 11, 2026 (after latest rumor of Jun 22). Kaizer Chiefs move did not materialize. Official appointment status warrants inclusion as escalation from coaching candidate to confirmed appointment.

rumor.detail: Transfer confirmed to Belgian club Royal Charleroi SC; visa processed and deal finalized

newIntel.reasoning: Latest rumor was Jul 3, 2026 (iDiski Times: 'confirmed'). New search results confirm deal is finalized with visa processed. Status escalates from 'confirmed' (deal agreed) to 'official' (player departed/club announced). Published after Jun 25 rumor, represents final completion of transfer.

needsReview.reason: Contract expiration is confirmed but no official club announcement post-Jun 30 found. Pre-contract agreement with Sekhukhune (Apr 15) is already in existing rumors. Requires verification of actual signing/club announcement to escalate status.
